title: caladenia bartlettii
intro: Caladenia bartlettii, also known as the 'Fairy Orchid', is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Caladenia bartlettii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional Aboriginal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
